canonical_naming_rule: Use responsibility-based English engineering names in code and documentation. UI-facing labels may remain Spanish/Castilian. Do not use Fetcher 1 / 1.1 / 2 / 2.1 as canonical names.

components.responsibility: Fetch PLACSP ATOM feeds; score, classify, enrich, and merge licitaciones into candidate envelope.
Lifecycle-safe scheduled append/merge of Harvester candidate into production data/licitaciones.json.
Classify scheduled-run outcome; emit ADGOPS_SCHEDULED_RUN_REPORT_V1 and GitHub step summary. Never mutates production data.
Table-driven offline regression of Merger and RunReporter semantics. Proves production data/licitaciones.json untouched. No network. No GitHub Actions dispatch.
Read licitaciones detail pages; extract and classify candidate document/pliego/anexo links. Never downloads binary files. Never mutates production data.
outputs: F2-A sidecar manifest (schema f2a/1) under _tmp/ or data/fetcher2/

components.responsibility: Probe F2-A candidate URLs; resolve final URL, content-type, MIME, filename, and content length. HEAD-first, bounded Range GET fallback. Never persists response bodies. Never writes production data.
outputs: F2-B sidecar manifest (schema f2b/1) under _tmp/ or data/fetcher2/

components.responsibility: Consolidate F2-B batches; run quality and merge gates; produce a dry-run persistence plan; apply accepted document evidence to production documents[] under explicit operator approval.
inputs: data/licitaciones.json (read-only for planning; write for apply)

components.responsibility: Fetch and extract text/structured metadata from confirmed document URLs (primarily PDFs). Produce per-document content sidecar.
inputs: documents[] confirmed links from production data

components.responsibility: Produce per-licitación document intelligence summary (Apéndice) from DocReader output. Feed the UI doc-intel panel.
Descriptive analytics over the licitaciones corpus: counts, distributions, timelines.
Interpretive signal layer: opportunity/risk/pressure scoring over the licitaciones corpus. Distinct from StatsEngine (descriptive). Feeds Barómetro UI.
Community/partner extensions. Must be classified per item (KEEP/PORT/REWRITE/DROP/DEFER) before any merge into the main pipeline.
components.next_action: audit and classify — no blind merge

paused.name: SourceHealth
paused.reason: p192 decision: PAUSE SAFELY. No runtime component depends on source-health monitoring. Reopen only if source-freshness or outage observability becomes product-critical.

decisions_locked.document_inventory_vs_content_gap: Inventory layer (DocIndexer/LinkResolver/DocEvidenceChain) is installed. The missing layer is DocReader + Appendix (content extraction), not more link discovery.
decisions_locked.stats_vs_barometro: StatsEngine = descriptive analytics. BarometerEngine = interpretive signals. Do not conflate.
decisions_locked.extensions_merge_posture: No blind merge. Classify each item KEEP/PORT/REWRITE/DROP/DEFER before integrating.

proposed_next_commit: docs(fetch): codify fetcher architecture naming (v0.6.46 / p193)
